overall.description: First-person perspective gameplay footage walking through a dark forest at night. The player follows a narrow dirt path illuminated by a warm flashlight, passing trees and rocks, with a temporary view of the character's arm holding an object, and approaches a wooden structure.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the narrow dirt path illuminated by a warm flashlight, surrounded by dense trees and undergrowth

entered.detail: narrow winding dirt trail with scattered stones and leaf litter
thick tree trunk with gnarled branches blocking the path ahead
dense cluster of tall trees with white bark forming the forest wall
dense cluster of tall trees with thick foliage forming the forest wall
small stones and rocks embedded in the dirt path
tall grass and ferns lining the left side of the trail
tall grass and bushes lining the right side of the trail

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark forest trail at night, illuminated by a warm flashlight. The camera moves forward along a narrow dirt path surrounded by dense vegetation and tall trees, approaching a large twisted tree trunk that blocks the direct path ahead.

events.description: character's arm holding a light source becomes temporarily visible on the left side of the frame

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path with a visible forearm and hand holding an object on the left, approaching wooden stumps in the middle of the trail

entered.detail: two short wooden posts or cut stumps standing in the center of the path ahead

segments.scene_description: As the camera advances, the character's arm briefly enters the frame from the left, holding what appears to be a flashlight. The large tree is passed, and two wooden stumps become visible in the center of the path ahead, marking a point of interest in the trail.

events.description: wooden cabin wall or fence structure becomes visible on the left side through the trees

agents.ego_description: walking past the wooden stumps and approaching a wooden structure visible on the left, continuing along the forest path

entered.detail: vertical wooden planks of a cabin or shed wall visible through the trees on the left

segments.scene_description: The camera passes the wooden stumps and continues forward, revealing a wooden structure on the left side through the trees. The forest opens slightly, allowing partial visibility of the night sky, as the path leads toward the wooden building.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a dense, dark forest that gradually opens up to reveal a man-made structure. It begins on a narrow dirt trail illuminated by a warm flashlight, moving forward through thick vegetation toward a large, twisted tree trunk that obstructs the path. As the camera advances past the tree, the character's arm briefly enters the frame from the left before the light catches two wooden stumps marking the center of the trail. The scene then expands as the camera passes these markers, shifting from the claustrophobic woods to a slightly more open area where the night sky becomes partially visible. Finally, the path leads the viewer toward a wooden building emerging from the trees on the left.
